Uses of Interface
org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra.Interval

Packages that use Interval
Package
Description
org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra
Defines fundamental algebraic concepts:
org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra.intervals
 
org.jscience.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.

  • Uses of Interval in org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra

    Methods in org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra that return Interval
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Interval<T>
    Interval.boundingInterval(Interval<T> other)
    Returns the smallest interval containing both this and another interval.
    Interval<T>
    Interval.intersection(Interval<T> other)
    Returns the intersection of this interval with another.
    Methods in org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra with parameters of type Interval
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Interval<T>
    Interval.boundingInterval(Interval<T> other)
    Returns the smallest interval containing both this and another interval.
    boolean
    Interval.contains(Interval<T> other)
    Checks if this interval contains another interval entirely.
    Interval<T>
    Interval.intersection(Interval<T> other)
    Returns the intersection of this interval with another.
    boolean
    Interval.overlaps(Interval<T> other)
    Checks if this interval overlaps with another.

  • Uses of Interval in org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra.intervals

    Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra.intervals that implement Interval
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FieldIntervalND<T extends Comparable<T>>
    N-dimensional interval over a Field (elements support full arithmetic).
    class 
    OrderedSetIntervalND<T extends Comparable<T>>
    N-dimensional interval over an ordered set (elements must be Comparable).
    class 
    RingIntervalND<T extends Comparable<T>>
    N-dimensional interval over a Ring (elements support addition and subtraction).

    Method
    Description

    ComplexInterval.area(Interval<Real> region)
    Returns the area of the complex region.

    ComplexInterval.center(Interval<Real> region)
    Returns the center of the complex region.
    static boolean
    ComplexInterval.contains(Interval<Real> region, Complex z)
    Checks if a complex number is inside the region.
    boolean
    OrderedSetIntervalND.contains(Interval<T> other)
     
    static Real
    ComplexInterval.height(Interval<Real> region)
    Returns the height (imaginary axis extent) of the region.

    OrderedSetIntervalND.intersection(Interval<T> other)

    RingIntervalND.intersection(Interval<T> other)
     
    static boolean
    IntegerInterval.isEmpty(Interval<Integer> interval)
    Returns whether the interval is empty.
    static boolean
    NaturalInterval.isEmpty(Interval<Natural> interval)
    Returns whether the interval is empty.
    static Iterator<Integer>
    IntegerInterval.iterator(Interval<Integer> interval)
    Returns an iterator over all Integer numbers in the interval.
    static Iterator<Natural>
    NaturalInterval.iterator(Interval<Natural> interval)
    Returns an iterator over all Natural numbers in the interval.
    static Real
    RealInterval.length(Interval<Real> interval)
    Returns the length (width) of a 1D Real interval.
    static Real
    RealInterval.midpoint(Interval<Real> interval)
    Returns the midpoint of a 1D Real interval.
    boolean
    OrderedSetIntervalND.overlaps(Interval<T> other)
     
    static long
    IntegerInterval.size(Interval<Integer> interval)
    Returns the number of Integer numbers in the interval.
    static long
    NaturalInterval.size(Interval<Natural> interval)
    Returns the number of Natural numbers in the interval.
    static Stream<Integer>
    IntegerInterval.stream(Interval<Integer> interval)
    Returns a stream of all Integer numbers in the interval.
    static Stream<Natural>
    NaturalInterval.stream(Interval<Natural> interval)
    Returns a stream of all Natural numbers in the interval.
    static FieldIntervalND<Real>
    ComplexInterval.translate(Interval<Real> region, Complex delta)
    Creates a translated region.
    static Real
    ComplexInterval.width(Interval<Real> region)
    Returns the width (real axis extent) of the region.
    static FieldIntervalND<Real>
    ComplexInterval.zoom(Interval<Real> region, double factor)
    Creates a zoomed-in region centered at the same point.

  • Uses of Interval in org.jscience.social.history.archeology

    Fields in org.jscience.social.history.archeology declared as Interval
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.ARCHEAN
    Archean Eon interval (~3.8B years ago to ~2.5B years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.CAMBRIAN
    Cambrian Period interval (~545M years ago to ~490M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.CARBONIFEROUS
    Carboniferous Period interval (~360M years ago to ~325M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.CRETACEOUS
    Cretaceous Period interval (~146M years ago to ~64.3M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.DEVONIAN
    Devonian Period interval (~408.5M years ago to ~360M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.EOCENE
    Eocene Epoch interval (~55M years ago to ~38M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.HADEAN
    Hadean Eon interval (~4.1B years ago to ~3.8B years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.HOLOCENE
    Holocene Epoch interval (~10,000 years ago to present).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.JURASSIC
    Jurassic Period interval (~208M years ago to ~146M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.MESOPROTEROZOIC
    Mesoproterozoic Era interval (~1.6B years ago to ~900M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.MIOCENE
    Miocene Epoch interval (~23M years ago to ~5M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.NEOPROTEROZOIC
    Neoproterozoic Era interval (~900M years ago to ~545M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.OLIGOCENE
    Oligocene Epoch interval (~38M years ago to ~23M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.ORDOVICIAN
    Ordovician Period interval (~490M years ago to ~443.5M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.PALEOCENE
    Paleocene Epoch interval (~64.3M years ago to ~55M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.PALEOPROTEROZOIC
    Paleoproterozoic Era interval (~2.5B years ago to ~1.6B years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.PERMIAN
    Permian Period interval (~325M years ago to ~251.1M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.PLEISTOCENE
    Pleistocene Epoch interval (~1.6M years ago to ~10,000 years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.PLIOCENE
    Pliocene Epoch interval (~5M years ago to ~1.6M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.SILURIAN
    Silurian Period interval (~443.5M years ago to ~408.5M years ago).
    static final Interval<Real>
    ArcheologyConstants.TRIASSIC
    Triassic Period interval (~251.1M years ago to ~208M years ago).
